title: Verify floating pill displays for Day 2-10 trial users
description: Test that the floating pill notification appears on homepage for users on Day 2 to Day 10 of their trial
preconditions: User has an active trial on Day 2-10

steps.description: 1. Log in with a user account that has an active trial on Day 2-10

expected_result: Floating pill with trial status is displayed on the homepage
